summary: Comprehensive testing of Product Lifecycle features (GHG Protocol). All backend APIs and frontend UI flows working correctly. Product Wizard with 5 steps, materials composition, transformation (semi-finished), usage energy, end-of-life treatment, and Product Sales with Scope 3 Aval integration all verified.
seed_data_creation: Emission factors seeded via POST /api/emission-factors/seed-new (31 factors: 15 materials, 10 treatments, 6 refrigerants)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product lifecycle features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/products/enhanced (create product with materials, transformation, usage), POST /api/products/{id}/sales/enhanced (record sales with Scope 3 Aval activities). ProductWizard has 4-5 steps depending on product type (semi-finished adds Transformation step). ProductSaleModal opens from Products page and Data Entry page (Scope 3 Aval categories).

backend: POST /api/products/enhanced - Create finished product with materials, usage, disposal
POST /api/products/enhanced - Create semi-finished product with transformation energy
GET /api/products - List products with enhanced flag
POST /api/products/{id}/sales/enhanced - Record sale with Scope 3 Aval activities
GET /api/categories - Verify Scope 3 Aval categories exist
frontend: Product Wizard opens with 'Créer une fiche produit' button
Step 1 (Infos générales): name, description, product_type, unit, lifespan_years
Step 2 (Composition matières): Add materials with dropdown, weight, treatment
Materials dropdown shows emission factors from database
Step 3 (Utilisation): electricity, fuel, carburant, refrigerant fields
Product Sale Modal opens from Products page
Product Sale Modal opens from Data Entry Scope 3 Aval categories
Recording sale creates activities in Scope 3 Aval
